chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-579 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.3557/2025 2. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 3. For orders on MA No.3558/2025 4. For hearing of Bail Application 10.7.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for the Applicant/Accused.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant bail application, applicant/accused Faisal Inayat son of Inayatullah, seeks protective bail in Crime No.129/2023, registered at Police Station Airport Sukkur, u/s 337-A(i), 504, 506/2, and 34 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant/accused is innocent and has falsely been implicated by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motive; that all the PWs are kith and kin, hence they are interested; that the offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C; that the applicant/ accused is ready to surrender before the Court concerned but apprehends his arrest and humiliation at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
